location.name: Location name
location.searchBeforeContinue: Search for a place before continuing.
location.coordinatesBeforeContinue: Enter valid decimal coordinates before continuing.
location.searchToUpdate: Search for a place to update this probe location.
location.coordinatesToPreview: Enter valid decimal coordinates to preview this probe location.
location.searchFailed: Location search failed. Try again later.
location.noResult: No usable location result was found.
location.outsideRange: The returned coordinates are outside valid ranges.

wizard.title: Create probe
wizard.intro: Name the probe, install it on a host, then wait for the controller to receive its first heartbeat.
wizard.identityDescription: The probe name and coordinates are stored before the install command is generated.
wizard.name: Probe name
wizard.stableNameHint: Use a stable hostname-style label so results are easy to scan later.
wizard.installDescription: Run the controller-served installer on the host. The wizard polls the controller and only completes after the probe heartbeat is recorded by the API.
wizard.heartbeatConfirmed: The controller API reports a runtime heartbeat for this probe.
wizard.heartbeatError: The controller could not confirm heartbeat status yet. Polling will continue.
wizard.heartbeatWaiting: Waiting for the first signed probe heartbeat from the controller API.

detail.rotateMessage: This invalidates the current probe credential. Keep the new secret and update the probe service before closing this panel.
detail.deleteMessage: This removes the probe from the fleet and stops future check assignments for it.
detail.secretDescription: Rewrite the systemd service environment with the rotated credential.
